21.reason: Precedence error: `!=` has higher precedence than `=`, so this assigns the result of the comparison (0 or 1) to ch, not the actual character. The loop never processes input, resulting in no output.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Operator precedence error: '!=' has higher precedence than '=', so this reads as ch = (getchar() != EOF), which assigns 1 or 0 to ch instead of the actual character. Should be (ch = getchar()) != EOF]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Operator precedence error: `ch = (getchar() != EOF)` assigns boolean to ch, not the character. Should be `(ch = getchar()) != EOF`.
